name: netflix-devops
description: Netflix-like streaming application with DevOps infrastructure

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/video-service"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/auth-service && npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend && npm run build --workspace=apps/video-service
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/auth-service && npm run test --workspace=apps/backend && npm run test --workspace=apps/frontend && npm run test --workspace=apps/video-service

author: DevOps Team
